MS.S: Microsoft Azure PowerShell - Cmdlets to manage resources in Azure. This module is compatible with PowerShell and Windows PowerShell._x000D__x000A_For more information about the Az module, please visit the following: https://learn.microsoft.com/powershell/azure/

15.2.0 - January 2026_x000D__x000A_Az.Accounts_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A_* Fixed telemetry to capture client request ID instead of server response ID for AutoRest-generated cmdlets [#23555]_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Aks_x000D__x000A_* Bumped API version to 2025-08-01_x000D__x000A_* Added cmdlets 'Get-AzAksMachine', 'Get-AzAksManagedClusterMeshRevisionProfile', 'Get-AzAksManagedClusterMeshUpgradeProfile', 'Get-AzAksTrustedAccessRole', 'Get-AzAksTrustedAccessRoleBinding', 'New-AzAksTrustedAccessRoleBinding', 'Remove-AzAksAgentPoolMachine', 'Remove-AzAksTrustedAccessRoleBinding', 'Update-AzAksTrustedAccessRoleBinding'_x000D__x000A_* Added necessary parameters for 'New-AzAksCluster', 'Set-AzAksCluster', 'New-AzAksNodePool', 'Update-AzAksNodePool'_x000D__x000A_* Removed cmdlet 'Get-AzAksManagedClusterOSOption'_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Batch_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A_* Updated the implementation of 'New-AzBatchApplicationPackage' cmdlet to not call 'Get-AzBatchApplicationPackage' to retrieve storage keys for security improvements. No behavior changes to the cmdlet._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Compute_x000D__x000A_* Added '-HighSpeedInterconnectPlacement' parameter to 'New-AzVmssConfig' and 'New-AzVmss' cmdlets._x000D__x000A_* Added new parameters 'ZonePlacementPolicy', 'IncludeZone', 'ExcludeZone', 'MaxZoneCount', 'EnableMaxInstancePercentPerZone' and 'MaxInstancePercentPerZoneValue' to 'New-AzVmssConfig' cmdlet._x000D__x000A_* Added new parameters 'ZonePlacementPolicy', 'IncludeZone' and 'ExcludeZone' to 'New-AzVmss' cmdlet._x000D__x000A_* Added new parameters 'MaxZoneCount', 'EnableMaxInstancePercentPerZone' and 'MaxInstancePercentPerZoneValue' to 'Update-AzVmss' cmdlet._x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.ContainerRegistry_x000D__x000A_* Fixed '-ExposeToken' with 'Connect-AzContainerRegistry'_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.CosmosDB_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.DataFactory_x000D__x000A_* Added more support for Jira V2 (Jira Version 2) and Netezza V2 (Netezza Version 2) connection properties._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.DataLakeStore_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.FrontDoor_x000D__x000A_* Fixed New-AzFrontDoorWafManagedRuleOverrideObject issue._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.KeyVault_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.MachineLearningServices_x000D__x000A_* Preannounced breaking changes. Please refer to https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2333229_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Migrate_x000D__x000A_* Updated DefaultCrashConsistentFrequencyInMinutes and DefaultAppConsistentFrequencyInMinutes to align with Azure Portal UX for Replication Policy_x000D__x000A_ - 'New-AzMigrateLocalServerReplication'_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.NetAppFiles_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A_* General availability for module Az.NetAppFiles_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Network_x000D__x000A_* Onboarded 'Microsoft.Security/privateLinks' to Private Link Common Cmdlets_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.PolicyInsights_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.RecoveryServices_x000D__x000A_* Added Cross region restore support for Bleu cloud regions_x000D__x000A_* Added Availability Zone support in Update Protection_x000D__x000A_* Added Platform Fault Domain support in Enable, Update, and Switch Protection workflows_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.SignalR_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Sql_x000D__x000A_* Added 'Get-AzSqlDeletedServer' cmdlet to retrieve soft deleted Azure SQL servers_x000D__x000A_ - Supports retrieving deleted servers by location or specific deleted server by name_x000D__x000A_* Preannounced breaking changes. Please refer to https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2333229_x000D__x000A_* The EnableSoftDelete parameter is deprecated from 'New-AzSqlServer' and 'Set-AzSqlServer' cmdlets and will be removed by May 2026._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.StackHCI_x000D__x000A_* ARC Enablement of Nodes Before Triggering Registration in New Registration Flow._x000D__x000A_* Resolved double hop authentication issue._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Storage_x000D__x000A_* Upgraded management plane SDK and auto generated cmdlets to base on API spec generated by TSP_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Synapse_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0

Microsoft Azure PowerShell - Cmdlets to manage resources in Azure. This module is compatible with PowerShell and Windows PowerShell._x000D__x000A_For more information about the Az module, please visit the following: https://learn.microsoft.com/powershell/azure/

15.2.0 - January 2026_x000D__x000A_Az.Accounts_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A_* Fixed telemetry to capture client request ID instead of server response ID for AutoRest-generated cmdlets [#23555]_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Aks_x000D__x000A_* Bumped API version to 2025-08-01_x000D__x000A_* Added cmdlets 'Get-AzAksMachine', 'Get-AzAksManagedClusterMeshRevisionProfile', 'Get-AzAksManagedClusterMeshUpgradeProfile', 'Get-AzAksTrustedAccessRole', 'Get-AzAksTrustedAccessRoleBinding', 'New-AzAksTrustedAccessRoleBinding', 'Remove-AzAksAgentPoolMachine', 'Remove-AzAksTrustedAccessRoleBinding', 'Update-AzAksTrustedAccessRoleBinding'_x000D__x000A_* Added necessary parameters for 'New-AzAksCluster', 'Set-AzAksCluster', 'New-AzAksNodePool', 'Update-AzAksNodePool'_x000D__x000A_* Removed cmdlet 'Get-AzAksManagedClusterOSOption'_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Batch_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A_* Updated the implementation of 'New-AzBatchApplicationPackage' cmdlet to not call 'Get-AzBatchApplicationPackage' to retrieve storage keys for security improvements. No behavior changes to the cmdlet._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Compute_x000D__x000A_* Added '-HighSpeedInterconnectPlacement' parameter to 'New-AzVmssConfig' and 'New-AzVmss' cmdlets._x000D__x000A_* Added new parameters 'ZonePlacementPolicy', 'IncludeZone', 'ExcludeZone', 'MaxZoneCount', 'EnableMaxInstancePercentPerZone' and 'MaxInstancePercentPerZoneValue' to 'New-AzVmssConfig' cmdlet._x000D__x000A_* Added new parameters 'ZonePlacementPolicy', 'IncludeZone' and 'ExcludeZone' to 'New-AzVmss' cmdlet._x000D__x000A_* Added new parameters 'MaxZoneCount', 'EnableMaxInstancePercentPerZone' and 'MaxInstancePercentPerZoneValue' to 'Update-AzVmss' cmdlet._x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.ContainerRegistry_x000D__x000A_* Fixed '-ExposeToken' with 'Connect-AzContainerRegistry'_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.CosmosDB_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.DataFactory_x000D__x000A_* Added more support for Jira V2 (Jira Version 2) and Netezza V2 (Netezza Version 2) connection properties._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.DataLakeStore_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.FrontDoor_x000D__x000A_* Fixed New-AzFrontDoorWafManagedRuleOverrideObject issue._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.KeyVault_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.MachineLearningServices_x000D__x000A_* Preannounced breaking changes. Please refer to https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2333229_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Migrate_x000D__x000A_* Updated DefaultCrashConsistentFrequencyInMinutes and DefaultAppConsistentFrequencyInMinutes to align with Azure Portal UX for Replication Policy_x000D__x000A_ - 'New-AzMigrateLocalServerReplication'_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.NetAppFiles_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A_* General availability for module Az.NetAppFiles_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Network_x000D__x000A_* Onboarded 'Microsoft.Security/privateLinks' to Private Link Common Cmdlets_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.PolicyInsights_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.RecoveryServices_x000D__x000A_* Added Cross region restore support for Bleu cloud regions_x000D__x000A_* Added Availability Zone support in Update Protection_x000D__x000A_* Added Platform Fault Domain support in Enable, Update, and Switch Protection workflows_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.SignalR_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Sql_x000D__x000A_* Added 'Get-AzSqlDeletedServer' cmdlet to retrieve soft deleted Azure SQL servers_x000D__x000A_ - Supports retrieving deleted servers by location or specific deleted server by name_x000D__x000A_* Preannounced breaking changes. Please refer to https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2333229_x000D__x000A_* The EnableSoftDelete parameter is deprecated from 'New-AzSqlServer' and 'Set-AzSqlServer' cmdlets and will be removed by May 2026._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.StackHCI_x000D__x000A_* ARC Enablement of Nodes Before Triggering Registration in New Registration Flow._x000D__x000A_* Resolved double hop authentication issue._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Storage_x000D__x000A_* Upgraded management plane SDK and auto generated cmdlets to base on API spec generated by TSP_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Synapse_x000D__x000A_* Updated Azure.Core from 1.47.3 to 1.50.0
Azure ARM ResourceManager Linux AzureAutomationNotSupported PSModule PSEdition_Core PSEdition_Desktop
